title: WorkspaceIntelligence
description: Workspace-level intelligence for a velocity-workspace repository. Captures the multi-repo graph, shared bounded contexts, shared agents/skills/guardrails, and sync configuration for all connected repositories.

description.description: One-paragraph description of the organisation and its software estate

shared_patterns.description: Architectural patterns in use across multiple repos

primary_language.description: Dominant programming language across the workspace

domains.description: Top-level business domain names (e.g. payments, customer, insurance)

repositories.description: All repositories registered to this workspace

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this repository

description.description: One-line description of this repository's responsibility

primary_domain.description: Business domain this repository belongs to (must match workspace.domains)

bounded_contexts.description: Bounded context IDs that live in this repository

sync.description: How workspace changes are applied to this repository

adapters.description: AI assistant adapters active in this repository

last_synced_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful workspace sync

context_map.description: Workspace-level context map: all bounded contexts across all repositories

path.description: Path to CONTEXT.md relative to the repository root

description.description: One-line description of this context's responsibility

dependencies.description: Context IDs this context depends on (for cross-context term resolution)

shared.description: Assets shared across all connected repositories

agents.description: Agent configurations shared at workspace level (override repo-level configs)

skills.description: Skill definitions shared at workspace level

guardrails.description: Path to workspace-level guardrails file (relative to workspace .velocity/)

knowledge_base.description: Path to workspace-level knowledge base (relative to workspace .velocity/)

downstream_webhook_secret.description: Secret name (e.g. GitHub Actions secret) used to authenticate downstream webhook calls

auto_propagate_contexts.description: Automatically propagate CONTEXT.md changes to downstream adapters on merge

auto_propagate_guardrails.description: Automatically propagate guardrail changes to downstream repos

require_approval_before_propagation.description: Gate workspace propagation behind a human approval step (for enterprises)

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workspace.md was generated or last updated
